## Summary

Describe the problem and the resulting behavior.

## Verification

List the commands, tests, or manual flows you ran.

## Checklist

- [ ] This pull request has one focused purpose.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavioral changes.
- [ ] I updated relevant documentation.
- [ ] I updated every in-repository producer and consumer for any contract change.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, secrets, or unrelated formatting changes.
